mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HierarchicalBoard (boardNo, boardTitle, boardWriter, boardContent, boardDate, boardGroupNo, boardUpperNo, boardIndent) VALUES(board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardTitle}, #{boardWriter}, #{boardContent}, sysdate, board_seq.NEXTVAL, 0, 0);
mapper.select: SELECT boardNo, boardTitle, boardGroupNo, boardIndent FROM HierarchicalBoard where boardNo=#{boardNo}
mapper.insert: insert into HierarchicalBoard (boardNo, boardTitle, boardWriter, boardContent, boardDate, boardGroupNo, boardUpperNo, boardIndent) values(board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardTitle}, #{boardWriter}, #{boardContent}, sysdate, #{boardGroupNo}, #{boardNo}, #{boardIndent});
